snippet: Your ING Banking app is ready to go! Dear Mr MAIOROV, Thank you for setting up the ING Banking app on your mobile device. You are now ready to: explore the numerous possibilities discover other ING
subject: Activation of the ING Banking app
body:
Your ING Banking app is ready to go!

Dear Mr MAIOROV,

Thank you for setting up the *ING Banking app* on your mobile device.

*You are now ready to:*

* explore the *numerous possibilities*
* discover other *ING products*
* check your *accounts* and *send money*
* access a range of services.

If you are re-activating the app after your access was blocked, you can now continue using it as normal.

Were you not the one who activated this app?
*Block your debit card immediately by calling Card Stop on 078/170170 and call ING directly from your ING Banking app, or dial +32 2 464 60 60.* Find all information about reporting fraud at https://click.ing.com/ls/click?upn=u001.UgbfBY88idPF-2FYvkgjWir2tZCu-2B2eW-2FZdn-2BuJe9p7dcjF9NybbqHRrDed-2FEKj1BfcJ66ZZObLPwX-2BVTbajeLpuabHH0dVwcCttndvEh37H8-3D1wDS_1QnDvVxXkBjpBZebjrr8-2B8CHvou-2Frm5QRozFsrfQaMqtyb4BchlGBZcDbLhwoy0ZamTW8SjauFR-2BK2qDOANNLiILLABQICrPzPbjTndfgQhc5nmsVqAZhn-2BFGFJBrjccohdkX9rZRMS0nJxqEHl2YCAwPaoCgBUuEQMpEzwdplYaJNNGwogR-2BeNsl-2B-2Bq-2FP2Rsr2YUwKy7BYUCquPJpv4MVKeH9NsAayulwYAnOylq8Mc2LauBmCPJMdBa0go-2BIwEPOKlHAbqcmT1BidYq9xlf9Ah39HUojvQYZIIJyGCdQPESGx8Icb9H1sOSa9tB6lk2JOI98ZgVtutuao3a5Sp0jhmkFaOwZuRG7cQv0zEekMHl4TFbIWECD9nwBUBNRGswGP9qN2qeKfvllrRntpkutuMp-2B4BvAUQwCNxGvvgzP4bbvXyEPkERwDdAdouSAjEVqY0DzEz33tnva5jfyNz3DgsbwJ-2BUuTabpEh9GGOXz2Gcn06adsM2S4ph55bE-2FuF57plwFVxDyUTpW8PcBkWgQf3GPYa-2B9kMENkv-2FQt-2FWpTl-2BoLbapqGd7jW0dHL27mN6RZZIk3AGK9guJJs1AxQqACPZpY9pJrTUeo778Ncmkg3SK8Wi4OlTvYXcVXCKR17Z6KQnB8ki7ZP4vvIzEE5EHPwFGHC-2FYuND1DEtFbJ7yMHvKCiQyxC-2FFW-2FJ-2Fz6Ae3wAwvjHcLMvjpuYuaz9EmwY2FpEyUmxKvp90damfLIfD8N5YyaCbXY49-2F45U9Y2wuN191O-2BbMott4YoaL8KvdU69POZ2wPUZwIYVz683eeVCIApaD5t6SBIAdfkgHWHvBz3NSbXrhJT2xvD7BqivSb4aRlVfOwzIZCkVXuui-2FLjfPplHed9f9zYVqk52qrrA-2FuDRqhHiux5uMF48ja-2FGADh-2FFcjKKbe6CY9w4zNJG2nlYYQ0Ja1Zm-2FRHm5l1v7RWRi-2BDj-2FWaeShtNcToPr5rkho4F31P8OiVosbI6EgpLdFawjyfqB-2FFmqB1Hsr2ZLVHhm4qi6iCd7OnT7SwA5fzHiN1ZYOKGuqPw-2FjWnjIfFch-2FGj9BgM1mpTDBMIT-2BLacXUa

This e-mail has been generated automatically. For more info or assistance, call our *Customer Service on +32 2 464 60 04*. We are available to take your call Monday to Friday from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. and Saturdays from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.

Kind regards, Arnaud Jourquin
Director Client Services

The Home'Bank, Business'Bank, ING Smart Banking and ING Banking app are available free of charge (apart from the costs of your telecom operator or certain transactions, such as international transfers) (SEPA) to all Home'Bank, Business'Bank, ING Smart Banking or ING Banking subscription holders (subject to acceptance by ING and mutual agreement).
